message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have your account ending ****1184 with an amount due of 8400. To verify identity, confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last two digits are 02. I still can’t make any payment right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified. I have the account ending ****1184 with amount due 8400. You stated you cannot make any payment right now. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I can’t commit to any payment right now.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosure completed: AI agent acting on behalf of Slice; conversation logged. Identity verified using borrower profile and last 2 digits of phone on file. Debt context established: loan ending ****1184, amount due 8400. Borrower stated they cannot make any payment right now and do not expect any income in the next 21 days. Hardship signal recorded as ongoing hardship with no expected income within 21 days. No payment commitment given. Assessment complete; next stage should not repeat identity verification or the 21-day income question. Next priority is phone follow-up for available next steps under policy."}

I understand, but I still can’t make any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, hardship review is the live path. I cannot offer a payment plan or reduced closure if you cannot commit within 21 days. If you want, I can record that you’re requesting hardship review only.
I’m still not able to pay anything right now. Please note the hardship review.

Hardship review noted. Based on policy, no payment plan or reduced closure is available if you cannot commit within 21 days. The live path is hardship review only. If you later have a payment date within 21 days, say so and I can check the approved options.
I’ve already said I can’t pay anything right now. Please just note the hardship review.
Hardship review noted. Based on policy, hardship review is the live path because you cannot commit to any payment within 21 days. I will not push for payment now.
Please stop repeating this. I am not agreeing to pay.
Understood. Hardship review is noted. I will not repeat the payment request.
